title: Section 41
content: 41. Power to cause registration of 1[waqf] and to amend register.--The Board may direct a mutawalli to apply for the registration of a 1[waqf], or to supply any information regarding a 1[waqf] or may itself cause the 1[waqf] to be registered or may at any time amend the register of 2[auqaf].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 2013, s. 4, for "wakf" (w.e.f. 1-11-2013). 2. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for "wakfs" (w.e.f. 1-11-2013).
